sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82595" key="periyo/fhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιψόφ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding all round, loud noise</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">549c</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
